to nationwide distribution.

For over thirty years, Richfield Group has built Vietnam's most trusted distribution platform — the partner of choice for the world's leading FMCG brands.

About Richfield

Three countries.
Three generations.
One promise.

Richfield Group began as a family business in Malaysia and has grown across three generations. Today we operate as one of the largest FMCG distributors in Vietnam — backed by an international group with deep local knowledge of every market we serve.

We don't just move product. We open markets, build category share, and protect brand equity for the partners who trust us.

What we do
01

General Trade

Nationwide coverage with over 1,000 salesmen across all provinces and cities.

02

Modern Trade

Retailer partnerships with trade marketing — display and event support.

03

Warehouse & Logistics

End-to-end storage, handling and last-mile distribution capability.

04

Import / Export

Customs declaration and full import support for international partners.

Joint Venture

Dory Rich JSC.

Established 2022 · TCP Group × Richfield

A successful collaboration
between two leading corporations.

Dory Rich JSC pairs TCP Group's leadership in Thai energy-drink production with Richfield Group's nationwide FMCG distribution capability in Vietnam — bringing manufacturing, brand-building, and distribution under one roof.

Dory
Rich
Visit doryrich.com.vn →
